data.title: Simplify Navbar masthead to plain text; remove the canvas typeset engine + @chenglou/pretext dep

data.body:
The desktop navbar masthead (LEFT_TEXT/RIGHT_TEXT, two 13px thin uppercase mono paragraphs flanking the wordmark) is canvas-rendered via JustifiedParagraph + a full Knuth-Plass typeset engine. Canvas text isn't selectable + has a11y risk; the engine is heavy. JustifiedParagraph is used ONLY by Navbar, and is the SOLE consumer of lib/typeset/{knuthPlass,hyphenate,render}.ts, hooks/use-fonts-ready.ts, and (with knuthPlass) the @chenglou/pretext dep. Plan: replace the 2 JustifiedParagraph instances with plain

mono text (font-mono, 13px/18px, font-thin, uppercase, text-justify); delete the whole typeset engine + use-fonts-ready; remove @chenglou/pretext from package.json; tidy the test-setup document.fonts mock if it was only for use-fonts-ready. Live navbar change (every page) — preview with the human before merge. Trade-off accepted: CSS justify is gappier than Knuth-Plass but text becomes selectable + accessible + the engine/dep are gone.

Cold review (independent sub-agent): PASS. Masthead repointed: LEFT/RIGHT_TEXT now plain

(2 desktop 13px + 1 mobile 8px), all font-normal (not font-thin), font-mono/uppercase/text-justify; constants preserved; JustifiedParagraph import removed. Engine fully deleted (JustifiedParagraph, lib/typeset/{knuthPlass,hyphenate,render}, use-fonts-ready, justified-paragraph test); grep for any deleted symbol = ZERO; no orphan dirs/importers. @chenglou/pretext removed from package.json + root importer in lockfile; pnpm install --frozen-lockfile succeeds (an archived artifacts/ importer retains entries but its dir doesn't exist on disk - pre-existing, out of scope). test-setup comment-only. Gates: typecheck/build/conformance pass; tests 7 failed/151 passed (FRAC-199 set, no new; only justified-paragraph test removed). Move to done.
